channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nate Diaz Hoping For UFC Return, Wants White House Card
item.description: Nate Diaz has his sights set on kickin' ass on one of the most unexpected stages possible: the White House. The MMA star tells TMZ Sports he’s all-in ...

item.title: Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
